title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, describes a shift in software engineering from manual coding toward agent-driven development. He cites data showing 30% of Cursor's pull requests are fully agent-developed, enterprise AI-generated code rose from 15% to 75% in a year, and engineers are transitioning into agent management roles.
